zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Prouz於1310年出生在英國英格蘭戴文維德沃希時，她的父親William le Prouz95歲，母親Emma Widworthy44歲。她和Roger DeMoels至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1335年11月15日之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特拉維頓，埋葬在英國戴文維德沃希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Prouz于1310年出生在英国英格兰戴文維德沃希时，她的父亲William le Prouz95岁，母亲Emma Widworthy44岁。她和Roger DeMoels至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1335年11月15日之前在英国英格兰薩默塞特拉維頓，埋葬在英国戴文維德沃希。

nameMeanings.name: Prouz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): nickname for a vain or haughtyman, from Middle English prod, prud ‘proud’ (late OldEnglish prūd, from the oblique form of Old Frenchproz).

variants.name: Proudman
meanings: nickname from Middle English proud ‘proud, haughty, arrogant’ + man. Compare Proud , Proudfoot .
(of Norman origin): nickname from Old French prud'homme ‘honest, upright man’.

variants.name: Prude
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Proud  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Prouz was born in 1310, in Widworthy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William le Prouz, was 95 and her mother, Emma Widworthy, was 44. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Roger DeMoels. She died before 15 November 1335, in Laverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Widworthy, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Prouz est née en 1310, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William le Prouz, avait 95 ans et sa mère, Emma Widworthy, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Roger DeMoels. Elle est décédée avant 15 novembre 1335, à Laverton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Prouz 1310 in Widworthy, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William le Prouz 95 und ihre Mutter Emma Widworthy 44. Sie hatte mit Roger DeMoels mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 15. November 1335 in Laverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Widworthy, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Prouz è nata il nel 1310 nel Widworthy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William le Prouz, aveva 95 anni e sua madre, Emma Widworthy, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Roger DeMoels. Morì prima del 15 novembre 1335, nel Laverton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Widworthy, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Prouzが1310年にイギリスイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで生まれた時，父William le Prouzは95歳，母Emma Widworthyは44歳であった。彼女はRoger DeMoelsとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1335年11月15日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラバートンで死去し，イギリスデボンウィドウオルシーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Prouz(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 위드워시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William le Prouz(은)는 95세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Widworthy(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Roger DeMoels(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 11월 15일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 레이버턴에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 위드워시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Prouz nasceu em 1310, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William le Prouz, tinha 95 anos e sua mãe, Emma Widworthy, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Roger DeMoels. Ela faleceu antes 15 de novembro de 1335, em Laverton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Prouz родилась в 1310 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William le Prouz было 95 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Widworthy, 44. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Roger DeMoels. Она умерла перед 15 ноябрь 1335 г. в местности лавиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности видворти, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Prouz nació en 1310, en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William le Prouz, tenía 95 años y su mamá, Emma Widworthy, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Roger DeMoels. Murió antes de 15 de noviembre de 1335, en Laverton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra.
